$comment: Slice 489 §5 — URL-addressable state contract for core.search-surface. The schema declares the addressable state shape; per slice 489 round-7 F7 (2026-05-12) it lives in a resource file rather than inline Java string. Bindings stay in CoreSurfaceCatalog.java because they reference typed records (StateBinding) with abstract storeId values the FE resolves at runtime.

query.$comment: Free-text search query. Maps to searchState.query via storeId='search'.

modifiedFromMs.$comment: Inclusive lower bound on modified-time filter (epoch ms). Maps to searchFiltersState.modifiedFromMs via storeId='search.filters'.

modifiedToMs.$comment: Inclusive upper bound on modified-time filter (epoch ms). Maps to searchFiltersState.modifiedToMs via storeId='search.filters'.
